zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard de Argentine於大約1180年出生在英國英格蘭賀特福爾格亞特 維蒙德利時，他的父親Reginald de Argentine51歲，母親Rose DeHalesworth35歲。他於大約1195年與Emma在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾梅爾布結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他於1224年被列為sheriff of cambridge, huntingdon, hertford & essex; participant in the fifth crusade。他去世於1246年在他的家鄉享年67歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard de Argentine was born about 1180, in Great Wymondley, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Reginald de Argentine, was 51 and his mother, Rose DeHalesworth, was 35. He married Emma about 1195, in Melbourn, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. In 1224, at the age of 45, his occupation is listed as sheriff of cambridge, huntingdon, hertford & essex; participant in the fifth crusade. He died in 1246, in his hometown, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard de Argentine est né environ 1180, à Great Wymondley, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Reginald de Argentine, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Rose DeHalesworth, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Emma environ 1195, à Melbourn, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. En 1224, à l’âge de 45 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of cambridge, huntingdon, hertford & essex; participant in the fifth crusade. Il est décédé en 1246, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.Great Wymondley, Hertfordshire, England: Great Wymondley, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Richard de Argentine um 1180 in Great Wymondley, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Reginald de Argentine 51 und seine Mutter Rose DeHalesworth 35. Er hat um 1195 in Melbourn, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom Emma geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. 1224, als er 45 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of cambridge, huntingdon, hertford & essex; participant in the fifth crusade aufgeführt. Er starb 1246 im Alter von 67 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Argentine è nato il circa 1180 nel Great Wymondley, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Reginald de Argentine, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Rose DeHalesworth, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Emma circa 1195, nel Melbourn, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Nel 1224, all'età di 45 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of cambridge, huntingdon, hertford & essex; participant in the fifth crusade. Morì nel 1246, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard de Argentineが約1180年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアグレアト ウイモンドリーで生まれた時，父Reginald de Argentineは51歳，母Rose DeHalesworthは35歳であった。約1195年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアメルボウルンでEmmaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。1224年，45歳の時，職業はsheriff of cambridge, huntingdon, hertford & essex; participant in the fifth crusadeと記録されている。彼は1246年に故郷で67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Argentine(이)가 대략 1180년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 그리트 윈이몽리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Reginald de Argentine(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Rose DeHalesworth(은)는 35세였다. 그는 대략 1195년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 멜보우른에서 Emma(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1224년, 45세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sheriff of cambridge, huntingdon, hertford & essex; participant in the fifth crusade이었다. 그는 1246년 그의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard de Argentine nasceu aproximadamente 1180, em Great Wymondley, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Reginald de Argentine, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Rose DeHalesworth, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Emma aproximadamente 1195, em Melbourn, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard de Argentine родился около 1180 г. в местности грит вимондли, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Reginald de Argentine было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Rose DeHalesworth, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Emma около 1195 г. в местности мелбурн, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. В 1224 году, в возрасте 45 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff of cambridge, huntingdon, hertford & essex; participant in the fifth crusade. Он умер в 1246 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard de Argentine nació aproximadamente 1180, en Great Wymondley, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Reginald de Argentine, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Rose DeHalesworth, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Emma aproximadamente 1195, en Melbourn, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. En 1224, a la edad de 45 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of cambridge, huntingdon, hertford & essex; participant in the fifth crusade. Murió en 1246, en su pueblo, a la edad de 67 años.
